meaning: n.坎伯威尔(原伦敦之一区)
examples: On Friday 21 May, the children and staff at Camberwell Grammar School dressed up as heroes and superheroes to raise money for children in need.
"We are dying out, " said Jimmy Jukes, the Pearly King of Bermondsey and Camberwell in south London.
William Claude Rains, born in the Camberwell area of London, was the son of the British stage actor Frederick Rains.
The fire broke out at Lakanal House in Camberwell, south London, in July 2009.
Geoffrey Bacon was ambushed at the doorstep of his flat in Camberwell, south London, on 26 April.
